metadata.og:description: Specialties: Improve the well-being of your trees with our tree pruning services. Trust the professionals at Mother Nature Tree Service to deliver quality work. Established in 1977.  Mother Nature Tree Service started in 1977 by my father Rob Whitacre Sr. in Winchester Va. I, Harold Whitacre Jr. took over the business when my father retired. We have serviced the Northern Shenandoah Valley since day 1 of this company being in business. We offer stump grinding, tree removal, tree restoration, tree cabling, tree trimming, & any storm Damage. We are licensed and insured, family owned and operated.
